input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.1.1
            TITLE: high voltage – hv

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.1.1: High Voltage – HV
T.9.1.1 High Voltage – HV  
Any voltage more than 60 V DC or 25 V AC RMS

final_answer: rule T.9.1.1: High Voltage – HV T.9.1.1 High Voltage – HV Any voltage more than 60 V DC or 25 V AC RMS
